revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{portal|日本}} {{Commonscat}} [[:Category:2世紀の日本|← 2世紀]] | [[:Category:4世紀の日本|4世紀 →]] [[3世紀]]の[[日本]]に…」
revision.text:
{{portal|日本}} {{Commonscat}} [[:Category:2世紀の日本|← 2世紀]] | [[:Category:4世紀の日本|4世紀 →]]
[[3世紀]]の[[日本]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:3世紀の各国|にほん]] [[Category:各世紀の日本|03]] [[Category:3世紀のアジア|にほん]] [[Category:古墳時代]]

revision.comment: link to category on Commons is now defined on wikidata
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:making categorization show up on newly imported categories and templates]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:1 revision imported]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:3世紀の日本]] [[ar:Category:اليابان في القرن 3]] [[az:Category:III əsrdə Yaponiya]] [[commons:Category:Japan in the 3rd century]] [[es:Category:Japón en el siglo III]] [[fa:Category:ژاپن در سده ۳ (میلادی)]] [[hy:Category:3-րդ դարը Ճապոնիայում]] [[ko:Category:3세기 일본]] [[pt:Category:Século III no Japão]] [[tr:Category:3. yüzyılda Japonya]] [[ur:Category:جاپان میں تیسری صدی]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Yayoi_period]].

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Japan}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6519313}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:3rd century in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1st millennium in Japan]]
[[Category:3rd century by country|Japan]]
[[Category:Centuries in Japan|03]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=3rd_century_in_Japan here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{Portal|Japan}}
{{Navseasoncats}}
{{Commons category}}
{{wikidata link|Q6519313}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Category:3rd century in Japan]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:1st millennium in Japan]]
[[Category:3rd century by country|Japan]]
[[Category:Centuries in Japan|03]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25169946025|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

{{Commons category}}
